response:
To Google Support,

I am writing to formally appeal the suspension of my account, which was recently blocked due to flagged suspicious payment activity. I want to clarify that I did not authorize, make, or recognize any of the transactions that triggered this security alert. These charges are fraudulent and were likely the result of unauthorized access to my account or a third-party compromise.

I have been a loyal user of Google services for many years, maintaining a clean history of legitimate activity prior to this incident. The sudden blockage has severely disrupted my access to essential tools, including email, cloud storage, and critical business communications, causing significant inconvenience and potential data loss.

I have already taken immediate steps to secure my personal information, including changing passwords on other platforms and reviewing my bank statements for further anomalies. I am fully prepared to cooperate with your security team to verify my identity and prove that I am the legitimate account owner. I am willing to provide any additional documentation required, such as government-issued identification, proof of address, or records of previous legitimate payments made from this account, to facilitate a thorough investigation.

I respectfully request that you review my case and reinstate my account as soon as possible. I understand the importance of security measures, but I believe this suspension is a result of external fraud rather than any violation of your policies on my part. Please let me know the specific steps I need to take to verify my identity and resolve this issue. Your prompt attention to this matter would be greatly appreciated, as I am eager to restore full functionality to my account.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
[Your Account Email]
